---
title: "Center for Tutoring and Learning (CDA) — Math & Statistics"
lang: en
---

The Center for Tutoring and Learning in Mathematics and Statistics provides free support to students enrolled in several courses in the Department of Mathematics and Statistics at Université Laval.

The CDA combines human tutoring, support workshops, and digital resources to support learning without replacing students’ own reasoning and understanding.

## Services
- **Tutoring:** targeted guidance on course concepts.
- **Workshops:** review sessions, problem-solving methods, and exam preparation.
- **Learning support:** work organization, note-taking, and exam preparation.
- **Orientation:** referral to appropriate resources when needs go beyond the CDA scope.

## GPT-CDA

GPT-CDA is a pedagogical conversational assistant developed to support learning in mathematics and statistics. The project is designed to guide reasoning, use course-specific notation, and maintain the connection with CDA teaching assistants when human support is preferable.

The project was featured in [ULaval News on May 22, 2026](https://nouvelles.ulaval.ca/2026/05/22/le-gpt-cda-un-robot-conversationnel-qui-epaule-les-etudiantes-et-etudiants-dans-les-cours-de-mathematiques-et-de-statistique-66c35c61-4649-41a0-befb-c2f79036ac30).

## Practical information
- **Affiliation:** Department of Mathematics and Statistics, Université Laval.
- **Coordinator:** Aurélien Nicosia.
- **Hours and format:** published at the start of each term on the official CDA page.
- **Contact:** [aurelien.nicosia@mat.ulaval.ca](mailto:aurelien.nicosia@mat.ulaval.ca).

## How to get in touch
- Visit the [official CDA page](https://www.fsg.ulaval.ca/departements/departement-de-mathematiques-et-de-statistique/etudier/centre-de-depannage-et-dapprentissage) for up-to-date institutional information.
- Watch for beginning-of-term announcements for hours, workshops, and access details.

::: {.callout-note}
Schedules change from term to term. The official Department page remains the reference source for practical details.
:::
